channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: I’ll resign as minister if my claims on roads are false — Wike
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FCT Minister Nyesom Wike challenges critics to disprove his administration’s road construction records in Abuja’s satellite towns, vowing to resign if his
Read More: https://punchng.com/ill-resign-as-minister-if-my-claims-on-roads-are-false-wike/

item.title: FG determined to end terrorism, banditry, says SGF
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Federal Government is more determined than ever to end terrorism and banditry in Nigeria, says SGF George Akume. Read more on government efforts.
Read More: https://punchng.com/fg-determined-to-end-terrorism-banditry-says-sgf/

item.title: Anambra varsity suspends priest over sexual misconduct allegations
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Paul University, Awka, suspends a priest and staff member over serious sexual misconduct allegations involving a female student. Investigations are ongoing
Read More: https://punchng.com/anambra-varsity-suspends-priest-over-sexual-misconduct-allegations/

item.title: BREAKING: Court strikes out suit seeking recognition of Turaki-led PDP
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Federal High Court strikes out suit seeking recognition of Kabiru Turaki-led PDP interim NWC. Learn why the PDP Turaki suit was dismissed.
Read More: https://punchng.com/breaking-court-strikes-out-suit-seeking-recognition-of-turaki-led-pdp/

item.title: US missionary condemns Plateau killings
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
US missionary Alex Barbir condemns recent Plateau killings, alleging nine relatives of a Nigerian pastor were “hunted and slaughtered” by terrorists. He cr
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-missionary-condemns-plateau-killings/

item.title: 29-year-old renounces cultism, surrenders pistol in Edo
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A 29-year-old aspiring musician in Edo State has renounced cultism and surrendered a Beretta pistol after an anti-cultism message. Read more.
Read More: https://punchng.com/29-year-old-renounces-cultism-surrenders-pistol-in-edo/

item.title: Villa sign Newcastle target Manzambi in club-record deal
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Aston Villa have beaten Newcastle to the signing of Johan Manzambi after completing a club-record £59.5m deal for the midfielder from Freiburg.

item.title: FG unveils digital standards portal to boost Made-in-Nigeria products
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Federal Government launches a Digital Standards Platform to transform Nigeria’s quality infrastructure, improve access to industrial standards, and boo

item.title: I replaced my space heater and ceiling fan with one Dyson appliance
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Designed for year-round comfort, the Dyson Hot+Cool HF1 combines quiet operation and simple controls with Dyson's signature bladeless design.

item.title: Court dismisses suit seeking INEC recognition for Wabara-led PDP faction
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: From Godwin Tsa, Abuja The Abuja division of the Federal High Court in a marathon judgment on Friday, declined to compel the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) to recognise the Senator Adolphus Wabara-led Board of Trustees (BoT) of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP). Justice Salim Ibra

item.title: UNICEF commends Sokoto’s investments in child healthcare, education
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
UNICEF Executive Director praises Sokoto State’s significant investments in child healthcare, education, and protection, highlighting their impact on Niger
Read More: https://punchng.com/unicef-commends-sokotos-investments-in-child-healthcare-education/

item.title: Nvidia Briefly Drops Below Apple As Most Valuable Company
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: In recent weeks, some doubts have cracked the AI bonanza narrative, with analysts wondering if the huge investments in Nvidia's chips and software can be recovered. The post Nvidia Briefly Drops Below Apple As Most Valuable Company appeared first on Channels Television.

item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Following his latest announcement, here are the reactions of fans to Fireboy DML's new and upcoming album 'ZUKO'. The post What are fans saying as Fireboy DML ushers in a new era with ZUKO? appeared first on NotjustOk.

item.title: Tinubu Promises More Roads, Hospitals, Schools Across Nigeria
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: President Bola Tinubu on Friday said his administration will continue to roll out infrastructural projects, especially roads, hospitals, and schools across Nigeria, saying the projects will be inclusive of rural communities. The president made the promise while inaugurating the reconstructed Arab/Gb

item.title: New Labour Leader Burnham Vows To Renew Hope As Next UK PM
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Nicknamed the "King of the North" for a nine-year spell as Manchester mayor, Burnham pledged to work to improve living standards in every region of the United Kingdom. The post New Labour Leader Burnham Vows To Renew Hope As Next UK PM appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Man United target Ederson takes huge decision on his future
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Atalanta have taken a major step toward securing the future of one of their most influential players, with reports indicating that Brazilian midfielder Éderson has agreed to a new long-term contract with the club. The new deal is expected to reward the 27-year-old for his outstanding performances ov

item.title: Bill Proposes 49 Extra NASS Seats For Women Ahead Of 2027 Polls
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …Senate may rise to 121, Reps to 397 under special seats plan A strong push for women’s inclusion in governance may see the National Assembly expand from 469 to 518 members ahead of the 2027 general elections. This emerged on Friday at a zonal caucus meeting of the League of Women Voters

item.title: Nigerian govt charges three men with terrorism over Oyo school children, teachers abduction
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The charges arrived barely a week after the Nigerian military, in collaboration with other security forces, rescued 44 schoolchildren and teachers abducted by kidnappers in three schools in Yawota and Ahoro-Esinele in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The post Nigerian govt charges three me

item.title: Anambra Court Jails Native Doctor ‘Onyeze Jesus’ 6 Years, Fines Him ₦20m
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Anambra State High Court sitting in Awka has sentenced popular native doctor, Onyebuchi Okocha, widely known as “Onyeze Jesus,” to six years’ imprisonment and imposed a ₦20 million fine after convicting him under the Anambra Homeland Security Law. The judgment delivered by Justice

item.title: Obi Mourns Amaechi’s Mother, Extends Condolences To Family
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) presidential candidate, Peter Obi, has expressed condolences to former Rivers State Governor and former Minister of Transportation, Chibuike Rotimi Amaechi, following the death of his mother, Dame Ezinne Mary Oduah Amaechi. In a condolence message shared on Friday,

item.title: Super Sprint tips: Kate is taking on Sam and Declan in the Newbury feature
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Kate Tracey, Sam Boswell and Declan Rix reconvene to discuss the best betting angles for the feature contest at Newbury on Saturday, the Weatherbys Super Sprint.

item.title: Oscar-Winning Actress Brenda Fricker Dies at 81
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Irish actress Brenda Fricker, best known for her Oscar-winning performance in My Left Foot and memorable roles in Home Alone 2 and the BBC medical drama Casualty, has died at the age of 81. According to the BBC, Fricker won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress in 1990 for portraying the mot

item.title: PCN seals 505 illegal drug premises in Cross River
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Pharmacy Council of Nigeria (PCN) has reportedly sealed 505 illegal and non-compliant drug premises in Cross River State, saying nearly half of all shops inspected were operating outside the council’s regulatory framework. The council disclosed this while briefing journalists on Friday&#160

item.title: Olubadan Promotes 10 Chiefs To Higher Status
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Olubadan of Ibadan, Oba Rasidi Adewolu Ladoja (Arusa1), has promoted 10 Ibadan traditional Chiefs to higher ranks in the Otun Chieftaincy Line in Ibadanland. During the promotion exercise, which took place at the Banquet Hall of the Olubadan Palace, Oke Aremo, Ibadan, on Friday, Oba Ladoja calle

item.title: Iran accuses US of hitting civilian infrastructure
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US military says its attacks were intended to "further degrade Iranian military capabilities".

item.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans

item.description: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the c

item.title: FG Arraigns Three Suspects Over Oyo Schoolchildren, Teachers’ Kidnap
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The Federal Government has filed a 10-count charge against three men over the abduction of pupils and teachers from a school in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The suspects, Abdulrazak Umar (also known as Abu Khalifa/Abu Khalid), Yunusa Musa (also known as Yunusa bin Musa), and Shamsu Ada

item.title: Mary Habila’s family petitions IGP for release of her remains
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Ms Habila was reported dead at a private residence belonging to the Minister of Works David Umahi in Uburu, Ohaozara Local Government Area of Ebonyi State. Her remains have since remained in police custody. The post Mary Habila’s family petitions IGP for release of her remains appeared first on Prem

item.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The [&#

item.description: Airtel Africa Foundation, through Airtel Nigeria, has reaffirmed its commitment to developing Nigeria’s future workforce with a high-impact virtual masterclass designed to equip young people with the practical skills required to thrive in an increasingly technology-driven economy. item.title: BREAKING: Court Strikes Out Suit Seeking Recognition Of Turaki-Led PDP Leadership
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Justice Salim Ibrahim held that the plaintiffs, led by the Chairman of the PDP Board of Trustees, Adolphus Wabara, lacked the legal standing to institute the action. The post BREAKING: Court Strikes Out Suit Seeking Recognition Of Turaki-Led PDP Leadership appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Nigeria Qualify For 2026 Volleyball African Nations Championship
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Nigeria have qualified for the 2026 African Nations Championship in Democratic Republic of Congo in September. item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has questioned President Bola Tinubu’s capacity to continue as Nigeria’s President, citing what it described as a growing pattern of appointment controversies, policy reversals and alleged loss of control over his administration. The opposition party, in a state

item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The former minister died on 15 July in Abuja. He was 87. The post Ex-minister Turner Isoun is dead appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.description: Reports have confirmed that UEFA will make key rule changes governing VAR ahead of a new season in the Champions League and other tournaments in Europe' The post UEFA make key rule changes ahead of new Champions League season appeared first on NotjustOk.

item.title: Supreme Court restores forfeiture of Emefiele’s Lekki, Ikoyi, Agbor properties
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Supreme Court has restored the forfeiture of properties linked to former Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) Governor, Godwin Emefiele, located in Lekki and Ikoyi in Lagos, as well as Agbor in Delta State, returning them to the Federal Government. The post Supreme Court restores forfeiture of Emefiele

item.title: Mary Habila’s family petitions IGP for release of her remains
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Habila, a staff member attached to the Minister of Works, Dave Umahi, died on June 27 in Ebonyi and her remains remain in official custody.

item.title: From Reality TV to Impact: Adekunle Olopade & Lolu Shomuyiwa Team Up for the “Protect The Boy Child Initiative”
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: BBNaija stars Adekunle Olopade and Lolu Shomuyiwa are teaming up for advocacy. With Lolu named Country Head of the Protect The Boy Child Initiative, the duo is tackling critical support systems for young men alongside their new documentary, "Close The Gap". The post From Reality TV to Impact: Adekun

item.title: We want Melah as your running mate – Concerned Gombe youths tell guber candidate, Pantami

item.description: A group, Concerned Youth of Gombe South, has urged the governorship candidate of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Gombe State, Prof. Ali Isa Pantami, to choose Barr. I.Y. Melah as his running mate for the 2027 governorship election. The group made the call in a statement issued and co-signed on

item.title: San Antonio to Borrow $944 Million for Major Airport Expansion
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: San Antonio, one of the fastest-growing US metro areas, is tapping the bond market for almost $1 billion as part of an ambitious program to expand and improve its airport.

item.description: Apple has overtaken Nvidia to reclaim its position as the world's most valuable company, with a market capitalisation of approximately $4.88 trillion compared to Nvidia's $4.86 trillion. item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Nigeria is building its external reserves to provide protection against shocks and excessive currency volatility, not to finance routine expenditure or serve as the foreign exchange market’s daily source of liquidity, Central Bank Governor, Olayemi Cardoso, has said. item.description: The minister said raw cocoa exports would continue to play an important role as the government expanded domestic processing capacity.

item.title: PCN seals over 500 drug outlets in Cross River, gives reasons
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Disclosing this at a news conference on Friday in Calabar, PCN’s Director of Enforcement, Suleiman Chiroma, said the findings were the outcome of a four-day enforcement exercise in Cross River. The post PCN seals over 500 drug outlets in Cross River, gives reasons appeared first on Premium Times Nig

item.title: Women Inclusion: Senate Seats May Rise To 121, Reps To 397 In 2027
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Strong indications emerged on Friday that the number of seats in the National Assembly may increase through a proposed constitutional amendment aimed at boosting women’s representation in governance.   Under the proposal, Senate seats would increase from 109 to 121, while membership of t

item.title: APRA Re-elects Karani, Mekeme, Ibietan to Lead Continental PR Body
item.dc:creator: TechEconomy
item.description: The African Public Relations Association (APRA) has re-elected Arik Karani of Kenya as president, Prof. Michele Mekeme of Cameroon as vice president, and Dr. Omoniyi Ibietan of Nigeria as secretary general, extending the leadership team’s mandate for another term. The decision was unanimously

item.title: Kidnappers Washed Our Clothes, Freed Oyo Teacher Debunks ‘Staged’ Claim
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A teacher rescued after spending 56 days in captivity following the abduction of pupils and staff from three schools in Oyo State has dismissed claims that the incident was staged, revealing that their kidnappers occasionally washed their clothes when they became too dirty and smelly. The teacher, Z

item.title: 2027 Polls: Court declines to compel INEC to recognise Turaki-led PDP
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Federal High Court sitting in Abuja on Friday declined to compel the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) to recognise the Senator Adolphus Wabara-led Board of Trustees (BoT) of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP). The post 2027 Polls: Court declines to compel INEC to recognise Turaki

item.title: 2026 W’CUP: Things To Know As France, England Battle For Third Place Glory
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: France and England will battle for third place at the 2026 FIFA World Cup on Saturday, with both sides aiming to finish their campaigns on a positive note after falling short in the semi-finals. Les Bleus saw their hopes of reaching the final ended by a 2-0 defeat to Spain, while the Three Lions suf

item.title: AIK sign Beyond Limits midfielder after Zadok Yohana exit
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Swedish Allsvenskan club AIK Stockholm has signed a new Nigerian midfielder, following the departure of Zadok Yohanna to Brighton, Soccernet.ng reports. ​In recent years, Sweden has become a fertile ground for talented Nigerian players looking to kickstart their European careers. The spotlight on Ni

item.title: Second tanker in three months hijacked off Yemen by suspected Somali pirates
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: There have also been several unsuccessful attacks in a region where piracy appears to be making a comeback.

item.title: Tinubu’s projects in FCT have silenced opposition — Wike
item.dc:creator: Tribune

item.title: 5 iPhones with the fastest processors in 2026
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Apple's iPhone processors have consistently set the benchmark for smartphone performance, making the company's devices some of the fastest and most powerful on the market. The post 5 iPhones with the fastest processors in 2026 appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: NPFL: Bendel Insurance sign Nwokeyi from Enyimba on two-year deal
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Bendel Insurance have completed the signing of left-back Nwokeyi Chukwuemeka Godstime DAILY POST reports. Nwokeyi penned a two-year contract with the Benin Arsenals. He joined from nine-time nine-time NPFL champions Enyimba. Bendel Insurance announced Nwokeyi’s arrival on Friday. The Benin-bas

item.title: Heavy rain, windstorm kill 3, destroy houses in Yobe
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: No fewer than three people have been confirmed dead, while houses and property worth millions of naira were destroyed following a heavy rainfall accompanied by a windstorm that swept through communities in Nguru Local Government Area of Yobe State. The disaster, which occurred overnight, affected Ts

item.title: Troops Rescue Nine Kidnap Victims, Recover 56 Rustled Livestock in Katsina
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Troops of the Joint Task Force North West, Operation FANSAN YAMMA, have rescued nine kidnapped victims, recovered 56 rustled livestock and arrested a suspected terrorist during separate intelligence-led operations in Katsina State. This was disclosed in a statement on Friday by the Media Information

item.title: Amusan Arrives Aberdeen Camp, Upbeat Team Nigeria Will Win Big At Commonwealth Games 2026
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Nigeria’s sprint hurdling star and world 100m hurdles record holder, Tobi Amusan, brightened the atmosphere in Team Nigeria’s camp ahead of the kickoff of the 2026 Commonwealth Games after arriving to a warm reception at the special training base in Aberdeen, Scotland, on Thursday, Compl
